title: ferray-stats: no keepdims= parameter on any reduction
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's sum, prod, min, max, mean, var, std, argmin, argmax all support keepdims=True which preserves the reduced axis as size 1. This is critical for broadcasting the result back: arr - arr.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True). ferray-stats reductions all drop the reduced axis entirely. Add a keepdims parameter to all reduction functions.
